mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.account_id AS accountId, u.dept_id AS deptId, d.tenant_id AS deptTenantId, d.dept_category AS deptCategory, d.dept_type AS deptType, r.role_id AS roleId, r.role_key AS roleKey, COALESCE(ur.effective_data_scope, r.fixed_data_scope, r.default_data_scope) AS effectiveDataScope FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id AND r.status = '0' WHERE u.account_id = #{accountId} AND u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.status = '0' LIMIT 1

SELECT c.uid AS uid, c.account_id AS accountId, c.auth_level AS authLevel FROM c_user c INNER JOIN t_account a ON c.account_id = a.account_id WHERE c.account_id = #{accountId} AND c.uid = #{uid} LIMIT 1
SELECT real_name AS realNameCipher, id_card_encrypted AS idCardCipher FROM t_account WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_account SET real_name_verified = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_owner_face_auth_attestation ( uid, account_id, provider, provider_request_id, provider_result, verified, auth_level_after ) VALUES ( #{uid}, #{accountId}, #{provider}, #{providerRequestId}, #{providerResult}, #{verified}, #{authLevelAfter} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT building_id FROM ( SELECT ub.building_id FROM sys_user_building ub WHERE ub.user_id = #{userId} AND ub.status = 1 UNION SELECT dbs.building_id FROM sys_dept_building_scope dbs JOIN sys_user u ON u.dept_id = dbs.dept_id JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND r.role_key = 'GRID_MEMBER' AND dbs.status = 1 ) scoped ORDER BY building_id ASC
SELECT tenant_id FROM c_owner_property WHERE uid = #{uid} AND account_status = 1 ORDER BY opid ASC LIMIT 1
